mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMON_GROUP_CODE ( CODE, NAME, REMARK, USE_YN, FIRST_REG_DATE, FIRST_REG_USER_ID, LAST_CHG_DATE, LAST_CHG_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{name}, #{remark}, #{useYn}, NOW(0), #{firstRegUserId}, NOW(0), #{lastChgUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT CODE, NAME, REMARK, USE_YN, DATE_FORMAT(FIRST_REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS FIRST_REG_DATE, FIRST_REG_USER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(LAST_CHG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS LAST_CHG_DATE, LAST_CHG_USER_ID FROM COMMON_GROUP_CODE WHERE CODE = #{code}
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMON_GROUP_CODE SET NAME = #{name}, REMARK = #{remark}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, LAST_CHG_DATE = STR_TO_DATE(#{lastChgDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), LAST_CHG_USER_ID = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE CODE = #{code}
